chunks.text: UC Berkeley is ranked #1 school for coding in the US - EECS at Berkeley According to Business Insider , most college computer science rankings only include factors like the number of research papers published, global reputation, etc., while ignoring practical coding skills. HackerRank , a free coding practice website that allows developers to hone their coding skills by solving challenges, launched a University Rankings Competition to figure out which schools produce the best coders. Berkeley was ranked #1 in America and #4 internationally out of over 5,000 participants from 126 schools. Categories Education Industry Students View Open Faculty Positions
